ddls:
CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "total_games" INTEGER /* Total number of games played in the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins in the season */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties in the season */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses in the season */,
  "points_for" INTEGER /* Total points scored in the season */,
  "points_against" INTEGER /* Total points scored against the team in the season */,
  "point_difference" INTEGER /* Difference between points for and against */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage for the season */,
  "points_for_per_game" REAL /* Average points scored per game */,
  "points_against_per_game" REAL /* Average points scored against the team per game */,
  "plus_minus_rating" REAL /* Plus-minus rating for the season */,
  "season_type" TEXT /* Type of season (e.g., regular season, playoffs, postseason) */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference of the season */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division of the season */,
  "final_ranking" INTEGER /* Final ranking of the team in the season */,
  "season_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season in which the game was played */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date on which the game was played */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Name of the opposing team */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Result of the game (win, tie, loss) */,
  "points_for" INTEGER /* Points scored by the team */,
  "points_against" INTEGER /* Points scored by the opponent */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., upcoming, in progress, completed) */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Location of the game (home or away) */,
  "opponent_score" INTEGER /* Score of the opponent */,
  "game_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent FOREIGN KEY ("opponent") REFERENCES opponents ("opponent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_game_result FOREIGN KEY ("game_result") REFERENCES game_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opponents" (
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opponent */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the opposing team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the opponent plays */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the opponent */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference of the opponent */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division of the opponent */,
  "reputation" TEXT /* Reputation of the opponent (e.g., strong, average, weak) */,
  "win_loss_record" TEXT /* Win-loss record of the opponent against the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opponent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game result */,
  "result_name" TEXT /* Name of the game result (win, tie, loss) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, player, analyst) */,
  "team_affiliation" TEXT /* Team affiliation of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions of the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season whose data was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data accessed (e.g., game results, team stats, player stats) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access (e.g., web, mobile app, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season for which the report was generated */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., season summary, trend analysis) */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report file */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the report */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Creation date of the report */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Last updated date of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_report_type FOREIGN KEY ("report_type") REFERENCES report_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the report type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)
